sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31471" key="ei)soptrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσοπτρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n31471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reflection as in a mirror,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.936e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
